variants.title: Donaldson K041175 Hydraulic Assembly
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson K041175 Hydraulic Assembly is designed to provide reliable performance in hydraulic assembly applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
specifications: Style: Hydraulic Assembly, Outer Diameter: 77.9 mm, Length: 173.3 mm
